rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relation to Gov't Code §2306.076, which governs the department board's authority to purchase liability insurance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The board may purchase from department funds liability insurance for the director, board members, officers, and employees of the department.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns department liability insurance, unrelated to homestead exemption.
